faqs.question: What are signs of termites in Springfield Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows, mud tubes on foundation walls, and small piles of sawdust-like droppings. Springfield Gardens' humid climate and proximity to green spaces make termite activity more common, especially in spring and summer months.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Springfield Gardens?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Springfield Gardens are completed in 2-4 hours for average-sized homes. Treatment time depends on your property size and infestation severity. We use liquid termiticides, bait systems, or fumigation methods, and our technicians will provide a detailed timeline during your free inspection.
